A desktop-polish release for the KasmVNC web UI — a cleaner, kiosk-style window and a de-blued Breeze Dark look.

## Changed
- **Kiosk-style main window** — the openbox title bar (minimise / maximise / close) is hidden on Krusader's main window; dialogs keep their decorations.
- **De-blued Breeze Dark** — the focus/hover frame around the file panel and the accent lines are now **white** instead of blue, and the file-list selection is a white bar with dark text. The colours are merged into `kdeglobals` so the Qt palette (which is what draws the panel frame) actually follows the scheme.
- **Status bar and command line hidden by default** for a tidier layout; the device-list button now uses the regular folder icon instead of the blue file-manager icon.
- **Swapped** the file-list background and alternate-row background shades.

## Fixed
- **Status bar / command-line visibility now persists** — Krusader only saves these on a clean exit, which `docker stop` skips, so toggles were lost; they are now applied as fixed startup values.
